verse_text: And he arose that night and took his two wives, his two maidservants, and his eleven sons, and crossed over the ford of Jabbok.

links.context: With surprising boldness, Habakkuk questions God's judgment. Here Habakkuk is like many other biblical prophets: Abraham ([[GEN.18:23]]ff.), Moses ([[EXO.32:11]]ff.), Jeremiah (20:7), or Amos (7:1ff.). Throughout the Bible, men and women wrestle mightily with God and His will, like Jacob with God at the River Jabbok ([[GEN.32:22]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
